2229650.name: ENDLESS™ Dungeon - Original Soundtrack
2229650.description:
A new musical journey into the ENDLESS™ Universe. The ENDLESS™ Dungeon original soundtrack was composed by Arnaud Roy and Lera Lynn. A space western album that features 25 tracks mixing folk, progressive rock and a unique blend of 90s synthesizers, iconic from previous games in the Endless series.

25 tracks. 100 mn. Includes MP3 and FLAC files.
